zh.South Hams, Devon, England: 英國戴文素斯 哈姆斯
zh.Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel De Moels於1322年出生在英國多瑟特芒恩爾時，她的父親Sir John de Moels19歲，母親Lady Joan Lovel17歲。她於1337年8月與Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay在英國英格蘭戴文登特頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年8月12日在英國戴文登特頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國戴文素斯 哈姆斯。

zh-hans.South Hams, Devon, England: 英国戴文素斯 哈姆斯
zh-hans.Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel De Moels于1322年出生在英国多瑟特芒恩爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Moels19岁，母亲Lady Joan Lovel17岁。她于1337年8月与Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay在英国英格兰戴文登特頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年8月12日在英国戴文登特頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国戴文素斯 哈姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel De Moels was born in 1322, in Marnhull, Dorset, England, her father, Sir John de Moels, was 19 and her mother, Lady Joan Lovel, was 17. She married Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay in August 1337, in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 August 1369, in Dunterton, Devon, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in South Hams, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel De Moels est née en 1322, à Marnhull, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Moels, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Lovel, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay en août 1337, à Dunterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1369, à Dunterton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à South Hams, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel De Moels 1322 in Marnhull, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Moels 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Lovel 17. Sie hat im August 1337 in Dunterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. August 1369 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Dunterton, Devon, England und wurde in South Hams, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel De Moels è nata il nel 1322 nel Marnhull, Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir John de Moels, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Lovel, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay nel agosto 1337, nel Dunterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1369, nel Dunterton, Devon, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a South Hams, Devon, England.

ja.Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Muriel De Moelsが1322年にイギリスドールセトマルンハルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Moelsは19歳，母Lady Joan Lovelは17歳であった。1337年8月にイギリスイギリスデボンダンテルトンでSir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年8月12日にイギリスデボンダンテルトンで47歳で死去し，イギリスデボンソウス ハムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muriel De Moels(이)가 1322년 영국 도르세트 마훌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Moels(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Lovel(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1337년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 던터턴에서 Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 8월 12일 영국 데폰 던터턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 소우스 함스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel De Moels nasceu em 1322, em Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Moels, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Lovel, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay em agosto de 1337, em Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1369, em Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel De Moels родилась в 1322 г. в местности марнулл, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Moels было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Lovel, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay август 1337 г. в местности дунтиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 августа 1369 г. в местности дунтиртон, девон, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности соут хамс, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriel De Moels nació en 1322, en Marnhull, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Moels, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Lovel, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay en agosto de 1337, en Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1369, en Dunterton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra.
